text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm taking a breather at the park...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The trick to running fast... The trick... I've never
really tried using any tricks while running,
though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come across Silence Suzuka wandering around in
a left-handed loop, absorbed in her thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I-I'm so sorry for blocking your... Wait, where
am I?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh gosh... It's one thing to get lost in my
thoughts, but I can't believe I've lost my way and
wandered so far out again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And what's more, I have nothing to show for it...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: Why not do some partner running with her?

Maybe the trick is hidden in that left-handed
loop you're in.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If I can't tell her what she should do, I can simply show her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for the advice. I'll try asking
her to run with me right away.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The trick is in my left-handed loop?
R-really?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That thought has never even occurred to me, but
I suppose I do always end up doing this...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll tell her about this. I just hope it helps
her.
